author: Kbediako
name: StageB v2 Scalar-Control Quant + LQER Top-1 + CaseOps Phased TTT
blurb: Under-cap accepted-family StageB v2 stack with scalar/control quantization, LQER top-1 asymmetric recovery, BOS-safe SmearGate/SparseAttnGate lineage, Brotli-only self-contained compression, and phased score-first LoRA TTT. Seed 42 reached 1.06099764 BPB; forced seed confirmation gave a 3-seed mean of 1.06149165, so this should be framed only as a single-run score with disclosed multi-seed variance and timing caveats.
technique_summary: StageB accepted-family CaseOps stack with scalar/control quantization, GATED_ATTN_QUANT_GATE, LQER_TOP_K=1, embed clip 15.0, warmdown 0.82, QK gain 5.125, SparseAttnGate scale 0.75, and phased score-first LoRA TTT rank80/prefix2500.
known_risks: Seed42 and seed314 shell process real time exceeds 600s despite script-reported TTT eval timers under 600s.
3-seed mean does not clear accepted top2 target due to seed999 variance.
Final PR must disclose accepted lineage and Python dependency requirements.

attribution.accepted_stageb_caseops_ttt_lineage: Accepted PR #1855 and its credited predecessor PRs
attribution.pufferlib: Inspected for research workflow ideas only; no code copied
